self_initiation.action: Generated wave-2-analysis.md with 5 gap analysis, 30 new target categories, funnel metrics update. Updated funnel-tracker.md with cycle 115 state and bottleneck identification. Break from doc-refresh pattern — actual data analysis work.

notes: Cycle 115 breaks from 114-cycle doc-refresh pattern.
